name: app-website-funnel-cloner
description: Expert "Funnel Hacker" skill that analyzes websites, marketing funnels, and apps to create brand new "cloned" versions with original content. NEVER copies content from originals - uses them as templates only to create new versions with same layout/style but completely new content.
author: OpenClaw Project

triggers.description: Main command for Funnel Cloner system
Clone a website with new content
Clone a marketing funnel with new content
Clone an app with new features

triggers.pattern: clone website|clone funnel|clone app|analyze website|funnel hacker|marketing funnel|landing page|sales page|opt-in page|thank you page|upsell|downsell|bump offer|website template|app template|create similar|make version|redesign|recreate|website analysis|funnel analysis|app analysis|competitive analysis|reverse engineer|template analysis|layout cloning|style cloning|content generation|new version|similar but different

commands.name: clone-website
commands.description: Clone a website with same layout/style but 100% new content

commands.name: clone-funnel
commands.description: Clone a complete marketing funnel with new content

commands.name: clone-app
commands.description: Clone an app with choice of 3 app types

commands.name: improve-template
commands.description: Take a template and improve it with modern best practices

commands.name: create-variations
commands.description: Create multiple variations of a template for A/B testing

commands.name: ethical-check
commands.description: Check if cloned content is 100% original (plagiarism check)

requireOriginalContent.description: Require 100% original content (no copying from source)

runPlagiarismCheck.description: Automatically check for content similarity with original

includeImprovements.description: Always improve upon original when possible

defaultAppType.description: Default app type when cloning apps (opencaw|desktop|web)

deliveryPackage.description: Include complete delivery package with documentation

system.html2canvas: For layout analysis and screenshot generation

steps: 3. Ensure OpenAI API key is available for content generation
5. Test with a simple website cloning example
requirements: OpenAI API key for content generation

examples.name: Clone Competitor Website
examples.description: Create a similar website for your business with original content

examples.name: Clone High-Converting Funnel
examples.description: Recreate a proven funnel structure with your product and pricing

examples.name: Clone SaaS App as OpenClaw Skill
examples.description: Create an OpenClaw AI Agent version of a SaaS app

examples.name: Analyze Website Structure
examples.description: Get detailed analysis of website structure without cloning

examples.name: Create A/B Test Variations
examples.description: Create 3 different headline variations for A/B testing

ethical.copyright_respect: No content copying, all new creation
